name: Mccall's Creole Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Very hot New Orleans-style -sausage, cut into 1/2-inch pieces (see note)
1/2 lb Smoked sausage cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1 lb Medium shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine ham, sausages and onions; over medium heat, sauté 8 minutes or until onion is soft. Stir in rice, add green pepper, scallions, the boiling water, parsley, garlic, salt, thyme, paprika and bay leaf. Mix well. Bring to a boil. Boil 5 minutes.
2. Over low heat, cook jambalaya, covered, 20 to 25 minutes or until rice is tender, adding shrimp the last 8 minutes. With a large fork, fluff rice and evenly distribute ingredients.
Note: Use chaurice, chorizo or andouille sausages, available at Spanish and specialty stores.
